_publications._publicationTitle: Electrical stimulation of Schwann cells on electrospun hyaluronic acid carbon nanotube fibers.

_contextSnippet: NF SC showed highest proliferation when unstimulated...Unstimulated NF SC cell number is significantly higher than all other NF SC conditions
details: NF SC showed highest proliferation when unstimulated, with unstimulated NF SC cell number significantly higher than all other NF SC conditions
